content: Mongoose plugin system: a plugin is a function (schema, options) => void. Can add methods, statics, virtuals, hooks, and index modifiers. Registered via schema.plugin() per-schema or mongoose.plugin() globally for all schemas. Must be applied before mongoose.model() compilation — hooks added after won't execute. Community ecosystem: npm packages tagged 'mongoose' are discoverable. loadClass() alternative loads ES6 class methods/statics. Real-world use cases: audit trails, soft delete, timestamps, multi-tenancy, search indexing.
